heading: Transfer of equipment during a public health emergency
label: 321r Transfer of equipment during a public health emergency

children.heading: Authorization of transfer of equipment
children.label: a Authorization of transfer of equipment
children.text: During a public health emergency declared by the Secretary of Health and Human Services under , the Secretary, at the request of the Secretary of Health and Human Services, may transfer to the Department of Health and Human Services, on a reimbursable basis, excess personal protective equipment or medically necessary equipment in the possession of the Department.section 247d(a) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: before requesting a transfer under subsection (a), the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall determine whether the personal protective equipment or medically necessary equipment is otherwise available; and

children.label: i
children.text: determine whether the personal protective equipment or medically necessary equipment requested to be transferred under subsection (a) is excess equipment; and

children.label: ii
children.text: certify that the transfer of the personal protective equipment or medically necessary equipment will not adversely impact the health or safety of officers, employees, or contractors of the Department.

children.heading: Notification
children.label: 2 Notification
children.text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services and the Secretary shall each submit to Congress a notification explaining the determination made under subparagraphs (A) and (B), respectively, of paragraph (1).

children.label: i
children.text: acting through the Chief Medical Officer of the Department, maintain an inventory of all personal protective equipment and medically necessary equipment in the possession of the Department; and

children.label: I
children.text: the Secretary of Health and Human Services; and

children.label: II
children.text: the Committee on Appropriations and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Appropriations and the Committee on Homeland Security of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Form
children.label: B Form
children.text: Each inventory required to be made available under subparagraph (A) shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.
